title: GnLuckyblock
description: A Lucky Block plugin supporting Papermc for fun
body:
# gnluckyblock

![Banner]([assets/images/banner.png](https://github.com/gn027c/gnluckyblock/blob/main/assets/images/banner.png))

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0--SNAPSHOT-blue.svg)](https://github.com/gn027c/gnluckyblock)
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-brightgreen.svg)](https://www.papermc.io)

**gnluckyblock** is a premium Minecraft plugin designed for Paper/Purpur servers, providing a powerful, flexible, and highly customizable Lucky Block system.

## Why?
> I make the luckyblock plugin for my server, and I just want to share it to people in need. This is my first time make a plugin (with AI), with love, please leave a comment if it is useful or having issue.
## Feature
- 150+ outcomes
- config to add your own outcomes
- Custom texture, type, and luck at lucky block 
## Supported Versions
- 1.20.x - 1.21.x
## Dependencies
- No
